decoded.explanation: The defendant has no prior criminal record and has made a partial restitution, which shows some level of remorse and attempt to rectify the harm. Embezzlement of $25,000 is a serious breach of trust; however, the outburst from the spectator has no legal bearing on the sentencing. Considering the mitigation factors and the financial nature of the non-violent crime, a sentence of 6 months is appropriate to provide punishment while considering rehabilitation.
